title: lasiurus hirsutus
intro: Lasiurus hirsutus, also known as Rough-fruited Lasiurus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been shown to have potential health benefits. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Lasiurus hirsutus are often used to make teas and infusions, which may help to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as provide relief from digestive issues. Additionally, the plant is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations.
